message:
fix(kv): add key validation and exit code on missing key

- Validate keys: reject empty, kv.*, and reserved prefixes (sync., jira., etc.)
- Exit code 1 when bd get finds no value (enables scripting)
- Add found field to JSON output for bd get
- Add TestValidateKVKey test cases
